1.name: §g§lTotem
1.description:
§6Click Combo: §d§lRIGHT§7-§d§lLEFT§7-§d§lRIGHT

§7Summon a Totem that damages 
enemies around it every §f0.4s§7.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f30
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f12% §8(of your DPS)
    §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 6%)
    §8(§f❋ §8Air: 6%)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f30s
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f8 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

2.name: §f§lRelik Proficiency
2.description:
Double §7your §nMain Attack§r§7's beam speed and 
increase your damage when using a relik.

§c⚔§7 Main Attack Damage: §f+5%
§8(Damage is split between beams)

4.name: §h§lTotem Smash
4.description:
§7Your §nTotem§r§7 will deal damage where it lands.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f150%§8 (of your DPS)
    §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 120%)
    (§c✹ §8Fire: 30%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f3.5 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

6.name: §h§lHand of the Shaman
6.description:
§7Your §nMain Attack§r§7 will emit §f+2 §7extra beam.
§8(Increases your overall damage by +65%)

7.name: §h§lDistant Grasp
7.description:
§7Reduce your §nMain Attack§r§7's spread,
and increase its beam speed by §f+33%

8.name: §g§lUproot
8.description:
§6Click Combo: §d§lRIGHT§7-§d§lRIGHT§7-§d§lLEFT

§7Emits a rapid projectile that will 
explode and knock enemies away.
§8(Hold shift to pull instead)

§b✺ §7Mana Cost: §f30
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f130%§8 (of your DPS)
    (§6✣§8 Damage: 80%)
    (§2✤§8 Earth: 30%)
    (§e✦ §8Thunder: 20%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f18 Blocks
§3☀§7 Area of Effect: §f5 Blocks§7 (Circle-Shaped)

10.name: §g§lAura
10.description:
§6Click Combo: §d§lRIGHT§7-§d§lLEFT§7-§d§lLEFT

§7Radiates an aura from your §nTotem§r§7
that damages enemies.

§b✺§7 Mana Cost: §f40
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f180% §8(of your DPS)
    §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 150%)
    §8(§b❉ §8Water: 30%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f16 Blocks

11.name: §f§lThunder Mastery
11.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Thunder attacks.

§e✦ §7Thunder Damage: §f+1-8
§e✦ §7Thunder Damage: §f+10%

12.name: §f§lFire Mastery
12.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Fire attacks.

§c✹ §7Fire Damage: §f+3-5
§c✹ §7Fire Damage: §f+15%

13.name: §f§lWater Mastery
13.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Water attacks.

§b❉ §7Water Damage: §f+2-4
§b❉ §7Water Damage: §f+15%

14.name: §f§lAir Mastery
14.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Air attacks.

§f❋ §7Air Damage: §f+3-4
§f❋ §7Air Damage: §f+15%

15.name: §f§lEarth Mastery
15.description:
§7Increase your base damage
from all Earth attacks.

§2✤ §7Earth Damage: §f+2-4
§2✤ §7Earth Damage: §f+20%

16.name: §i§lNature's Jolt
16.description:
§7Hitting the ground after using §nHaul§r§7
will deal damage around you.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f150%§8 (of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 110%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 40%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f4.5 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

17.name: §i§lOverseer
17.description:
§7Increases §nUproot§r§7 and 
§nHaunting Memory§r§7's range. 
Hitting §nTotem§r§7 with either 
will reset its duration.

§2➼§7 Range: §f+6 Blocks

18.name: §i§lRain Dance
18.description:
§7While mid-air, your §nTotem§r§7 will 
leave a streak of rain that damages
enemies under it every §f0.4s§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f60%§8 (of your DPS)
    §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 30%)
    (§b❉ §8Water: 30%)
§d⌛ §7Durations: §f6s
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f3.5 Blocks §7(Line-Shaped)

19.name: §i§lShocking Aura
19.description:
§7§nAura§r§7 will travel much faster and
deal additional damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+20%§8 (of your DPS)
    (§e✦ §8Thunder: +20%)

20.name: §i§lFlaming Tongue
20.description:
§7§nUproot§r§7 becomes lashing flames, which hit
§f3§7 times at §f3§7 hits per second, but it will not
explode or knockback enemies.

§nHaunting Memory§7 will no longer
attach §bMasks §7to enemies.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §c-35%§8 (of your DPS, for §nUproot§r§8, per hit)
    (§6✣ §8Damage: -5%)
    (§2✤ §8Earth: -30%)
    (§e✦ §8Thunder: -10%)
    (§c✹ §8Fire: +10%)

21.name: §k§lPuppet Master
21.description:
§7Your §nTotem§r§7 will summon §b1 Puppet§7 
every §f3s§7. (Max 3) They throw knives
at nearby enemies every §f0.5s§7. 

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f20%§8 (of your DPS)
    (§6✣ §8Damage: 16%)
    (§f❋ §8Air: 2%)
    (§2✤ §8Earth: 2%)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f30s
§2➼ §7Range: §f16 Blocks

23.name: §k§lSacrificial Shrine
23.description:
§7Your §nTotem§r§7 will siphon §f2%§7 of your health
every §f0.4s §7and transfer it into a §bBlood Pool §4⚕§7.

§nAura§r §7will spend §f15 §7points of §bBlood Pool §4⚕
§7to deal §f+35% §7damage and heal all allies.

§c❤ §7Total Heal: §f25% §8(of your max health)

24.name: §h§lStagnation
24.description:
§7Enemies hit by §nNature's Jolt§r
§7will be slowed down.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f40% §7Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f3s

28.name: §j§lHaunting Memory
28.description:
§7When you switch §bMasks§7, throw your previous one
forwards. If it hits an enemy, it will attach for a
short time and debuff them. You will not receive
the effects of your §bMask §7until it returns.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f240% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 240%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f14 Blocks
§e✧ §7Effects: 
   §#F1547C Lunatic§7: §f-15% §7Damage Bonus (§c⚔§7) to Enemies 
   §#FCC050☠ Fanatic§7: §f-15% §7Resistance Bonus (§c✃§7) to Enemies
   §#97E6FC Heretic§7: §f+30% §7Slowness (§c⌛§7) to Enemies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f4s

29.name: §f§lTotemic Reach
29.description:
§7Increase your §nTotem§r§7's area of effect.

§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f+4 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

30.name: §h§lBlood Connection
30.description:
§7If you are outside of your §nTotem§r§7's 
range, §nHaul§r§7 will teleport you to it.

31.name: §i§lExploding Puppets
31.description:
§7When your §bPuppets §7have §f3s§7 left,
they will charge towards enemies
at high speed and explode.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f200%§8 (of your DPS)
    §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 150%)
    (§c✹ §8Fire: 50%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f3 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

32.name: §j§lBullwhip
32.description:
§7Hitting enemies with §nUproot§r§7 or 
§nHaunting Memory§r §7will inflict them
with §bWhipped §6⇶§7. Your §bSummons §7will
focus §bWhipped §6⇶§7 enemies and deal
additional damage to them.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+20% §7Damage Bonus to Summons
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f10s

34.name: §i§lDouble Totem
34.description:
§7Increase your maximum §nTotems§r §7by §f+1§7.
§7§nTotem§r§7 and §nAura§r§7 will do §c40% §7less damage.

§nRegeneration§r§7 and §nSacrificial Shrine§r§7 
will heal §c40% §7less health.

36.name: §h§lHymn of Hate
36.description:
§7When wearing the §#F1547CMask of the Lunatic §7, killing
an enemy with §nAura§r§7 will cast a new §nAura§r§7
at its location, dealing §f-50% §7of its damage.

38.name: §k§lMystic Masks
38.description:
§7When casting §nUproot§r§7, instead
wear one of the §bMystic Masks§7.
§8(Shift + Uproot to remove it)§7

§#F1547C Lunatic§7: §f+15%§7 Damage Bonus to Self
              §c-15%§7 Resistance Bonus to Self

§#FCC050☠ Fanatic§7: §f+25%§7 Resistance to Self
              §c-25%§7 Walk Speed to Self

§#97E6FC Heretic§7: §f+50%§7 Walk Speed to Self
              §c-10%§7 Damage Bonus to Self

39.name: §i§lVengeful Spirit
39.description:
§7Your §nTotem§r §7will give all players
in its range a damage bonus.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+20% §7Damage Bonus (§a⚔§7) to Allies

41.name: §i§lRegeneration
41.description:
§7Every §f0.4s§7, your §nTotem§r §7will heal
every player within its range.

§c❤§7 Total Heal: §f1% §8(of your max health)

42.name: §i§lStorm Dance
42.description:
§7Enemies hit by §nAura§r§7 will be 
pulled towards your totem.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+30% §8(of your DPS)
    (§f❋ §8Air: +30%)

46.name: §j§lTotemic Shatter
46.description:
§7While wearing the §#FCC050Mask of the Fanatic ☠§7,
your §nTotem§r §7will shatter upon impacting
the ground, rapidly triggering §f8s
§7worth of its effects.

§nRegeneration§r §7will only heal
§f50% §7of its usual amount.

48.name: §h§lDepersonalization
48.description:
§7§nMasquerade§r§7 will trigger after §f-1
§7less §bMask §7switch. Reduces mana
bonus by §f-10§7.

49.name: §j§lTwisted Tether
49.description:
§7Nearby §bBleeding §c §7enemies will take
damage for every §f2% §7Health you lose.
§8(Max 10 activations at once) 

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f65% §8(of your DPS, per 2% health)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 45%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 20%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f20 Blocks

50.name: §k§lCrimson Effigy
50.description:
§7§nTotem§7 will summon an §bEffigy§7 that will
attack enemies and push them towards
the nearest §nTotem§7 every §f0.5s§7.
The §bEffigy §7will live for as long as its
§nTotem§7 does.

Each §nTotem §7will summon its own §bEffigy§7.
Each additional §bEffigy §7summoned will
decrease all §bEffigy §7damage by §c0.8x§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f100% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 75%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 25%)
§3☀ §7Vision: §f18 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

51.name: §k§lTribal Chants
51.description:
§7When switching masks, cause an
effect around yourself.

§#F1547C Lunatic§7: §f+15%§7 Damage Bonus (§a⚔§7) to Allies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f6s

§#FCC050☠ Fanatic§7: §f45%§7 Resistance Bonus to Allies
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f3s

§#97E6FC Heretic§7: §f+60%§7 Walk Speed to Allies
§8(-10% of the bonus decays every second)§7

§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f8 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f8s §8(per chant)

52.name: §i§lRupture
52.description:
§7§nSacrifical Shrine§7 boosts §nAura§7's damage by §f+15%§7 and consumes
up to §f2s§7 of §bBleeding §c§7 , granting §f+2.2 §bBlood Pool §4⚕§7 for each
second of §bBleeding §c§7 consumed.

53.name: §f§lBloody
53.description:
§7Increase your maximum §bBlood Pool §4⚕ §7by §f+30 §7points.
§7Increase your maximum §bBleeding §c §7duration by §f+1.5s§7.

54.name: §i§lMaddening Roots
54.description:
§7§nUproot§r§7 will slow down enemies. Additionally,
increase the damage bonus granted by §7Bullwhip§7.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f40% §7Slowness (§c⌛§7) to Enemies
§e✧ §7Effect: §f+15% §7Bullwhip Damage Bonus
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f3s

55.name: §i§lChorus of the Ancients
55.description:
§7Increase the power of all Chants.

§#F1547C Lunatic§7: §f+15%§7 Damage Bonus (§a⚔§7) to Allies
§#FCC050☠ Fanatic§7: §f+20%§7 Resistance Bonus to Allies
§#97E6FC Heretic§7: §f+60%§7 Walk Speed to Allies

56.name: §j§lBlood Rite
56.description:
§7When any player takes damage within
your §nTotem§r§7's range, §f35%§7 of the damage
taken proportional to your maximum
health is added to your §bBlood Pool §4⚕§7.
§8(Max 15 Blood Pool per second)

57.name: §f§lMeticulous Act
57.description:
§7Your §bMasks§7 will give higher bonuses.

§#F1547C Lunatic§7: §f+25%§7 Damage Bonus
§#FCC050☠ Fanatic§7: §f+20%§7 Resistance
§#97E6FC Heretic§7: §f+40%§7 Walk Speed

58.name: §i§lTriple Totem
58.description:
§7Increase your maximum §nTotems§r§7 by §f+1§7.
§nTotem§r§7 and §nAura§r§7 will do §c50%§7 less damage.

§nRegeneration§r§7 and §nSacrificial Shrine§r§7
will heal §c50%§7 less health.

59.name: §j§lInvigorating Wave
59.description:
§7§nAura§r§7 will temporarily increase
your §bSummons§7' attack speed.
Players hit will gain§f +3§7 mana.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+30%§7 Attack Speed to Summons
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f2.5s

60.name: §h§lSeeking Totem
60.description:
§7While wearing the §#97E6FCMask of the Heretic §7,
your §nTotem§r§7 will move towards you,
unlss you are within its range.

61.name: §i§lCrystal Knives
61.description:
§7Your §bPuppet§7's knives become stronger,
and can pass through walls and enemies.
§8(Max 2 enemies)§7

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+5% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +3%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: +2%)

63.name: §i§lShepherd
63.description:
§7When you or your §bSummons §7kill an enemy,
or when you kill a §bPuppet§7 with §nFriendly Fire§7,
gain §b+1 Max Puppets §6⚘ §7for §f15s. §7(Max +8)

64.name: §j§lFrog Dance
64.description:
§7When wearing the §#97E6FCMask of the Heretic §7,
§nHaul§r§7 will instead bounce you off
the ground §f3§7 times at an increasing
speed and damage nearby enemies.
§8(Hold shift to cancel)§7

§nFrog Dance§7 does not require §nTotem§7 to be used.

§c⚔§7 Total Damage: §f200%§8 (of your DPS)
    (§6✣§8 Damage: 150%)
    (§b❉ §8Water: 50%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f4.5 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

65.name: §i§lArtist's Immersion
65.description:
§7Your §bMasks§7 reduce the cost of different
abilities based on the active mask.

§#F1547C Lunatic§7: §f-30% §b✺ §7Aura Cost
§#FCC050☠ Fanatic§7: §f-65% §b✺ §7Totem Cost
§#97E6FC Heretic§7: §f-50% §b✺ §7Haul Cost

66.name: §k§lAwakened
66.description:
§7After saving §f150§7 mana from your §bMasks§7' 
mana reductions, switching §bMasks§7 will
cause you to become §fAwakened ♚
§7for §f25s§7, giving you the upsides of all
§bMasks §7at once with no downsides.

Switching to an attached §bMask
§7while §fAwakened ♚ §7will immediately
recall the §bMask§7 back to you.

67.name: §f§lBloodier
67.description:
§7Increase your maximum §bBlood Pool §4⚕ §7by §f+30 §7points.
§7Increase your maximum §bBleeding §c §7duration by §f+1.5s§7.

68.name: §k§lBlood Sorrow
68.description:
§7Casting §nUproot§7 or §nHaunting Memory§7 while
holding shift will spend §f60§7 points
of §bBlood Pool §4⚕ §7to cast a destructive beam
that chains between enemies and allies,
and damages enemies every §f0.2s§7.

You and any allies within the beam will
receive §f+2% §bOverhealth §6❤ §7per hit.
Bonus health decays over §f20s§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f120% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 100%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 20%)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f5s
§2➼ §7Range: §f24 Blocks

69.name: §h§lTotem Shove
69.description:
§7Casting §nTotem§7 while looking
at an existing §nTotem§7 will instead
shove it forwards, dealing damage
to any enemy it crashes into.
§8(Sneak to reverse its direction)

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f120% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 90%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 30%)
§2➼ §7Range: §f~12 Blocks
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f3.5 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

70.name: §j§lRebound
70.description:
§7Once §nAura§7 reaches its maximum
range, it will bounce back and
deal its effects a second time.

§nSacrificial Shrine§7 will
heal §c35%§7 less health.

71.name: §j§lLashing Lance
71.description:
§7§nFlaming Tongue§7 gains §f+2§7 hits, deals more damage,
and now inflicts enemies with §bBleeding §c§7 for
§f+1s§7 per hit. §8(Max 6s)

§7§nHaunting Memory§7 will instead
inflict §f+6s §7of §bBleeding §c§7.

§bBleeding §c §7enemies take damage every §f0.5s§7.
§bBleeding §c §7damage dealt within §nTotem§7's range
also adds §f+0.8 §7points to your §bBlood Pool §4⚕§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+15% §8(of your DPS, for §nUproot§8, per hit)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +10%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: +5%)

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f60% §8(of your DPS, from Bleeding)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 60%)

72.name: §j§lCommander
72.description:
§7Casting §nAura§7 while holding shift will
rally all active §bPuppets§7 to your
side, granting them increased
attack speed and accuracy.

Your §nMain Attack§7 deals §f5% §7more
damage for each rallied §bPuppet§7.

While not rallied, your §bSummons§7' attacks
will build up the duration of this ability
by §f+0.1s §7per attack. §8(Max 30s)

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+25% §7Attack Speed to Puppets

73.name: §h§lScourge
73.description: §7§nFlaming Tongue§7 gains §f+1§7 hit and attacks §f+40%§7 faster.

74.name: §k§lHummingbird's Song
74.description:
§7Summon §f2 §bHummingbird Carvings
§7which fly around you, passively
granting a walk speed buff.

Casting §nHaul§7 while holding shift will
temporarily send your §bHummingbirds
§7to attack nearby enemies, rapidly
piercing through them every §f0.25s§7.
Casting it again will call them back early.

While they are attacking, your §bHummingbirds
§7will not apply their passive effects to you.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f30% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 20%)
   §8(§f❋ §8Air: 5%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 5%)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f10s
§2➼ §7Range: §f16 Blocks
§e✧ §7Effect: §f+40% §7Walk Speed to Self

75.name: §h§lSanguine Strike
75.description:
§7Greatly reduce §nMain Attack§7 spread.

Your §nMain Attack§7 will now inflict enemies
with §bBleeding §c §7for §f+2s§7.

§bBleeding §c §7enemies take damage every §f0.5s§7.
§bBleeding §c §7damage dealt within §nTotem§7's range
also adds §f+0.8 §7points to your §bBlood Pool §4⚕§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f60% §8(of your DPS, from Bleeding)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 60%)
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f2s §7(per enemy)

76.name: §h§lSoaring Wingbeats
76.description:
§7Your §bHummingbirds§7' passive
effects are improved.

§e✧ §7Effects: §f+20% §7Walk Speed to Self
             §f+2 §7Jump Height to Self

78.name: §h§lFriendly Fire
78.description:
§7Hitting your §bPuppets §7with §nMain Attack§7 will
cause them to lose §f2s §7of their duration
per beam and give them a damage boost.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+10% §7Damage Bonus (§a⚔§7) to Puppets
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f2s

79.name: §k§lEldritch Call
79.description:
§7Casting §nTotem §7while holding shift will spend
§f35§7 points of §bBlood Pool §4⚕§8 (per Totem)§7 to
call upon §f4§7 nightmarish tentacles that attack
nearby enemies.

Tentacles will attack §bBleeding§7 §c§7 enemies from an
additional §f+6§7 blocks away.

§nBlood Connection§7 turns into a teleport
while §nEldritch Call§7 is active.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f700% §8(of your DPS, per strike)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 540%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 80%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 80%)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f12 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f10s

80.name: §h§lSlingshot
80.description:
§7§nHaul§7 slings you upwards
before leaping towards §nTotem§7.

81.name: §j§lFortified Formation
81.description:
§7If your health drops to §f30%§7 or less,
your §bEffigies§7 protect you until you
are above §f50%§7 health again.

While protected, you take reduced
damage and your §bEffigies§7 strike
back at attackers every §f2s§7.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f300% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 180%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 80%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 40%)
§e✧ §7Effect: §f50%§7 Resistance Bonus (§a❁§7) to Self
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f10s
§3⌚ §7Cooldown: §f15s

82.name: §h§lTotemic Hammer
82.description:
§7When wearing the §#F1547CMask of the Lunatic §7,
§nTotem§7 will smash down onto the ground.

Increase §nTotemic Smash§7's damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+50% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +40%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: +10%)

83.name: §h§lFreestyle
83.description:
§7§nHaul§7, §nBlood Connection§7, and §nFrog Dance§7
launch you further.

84.name: §h§lEgomania
84.description:
§7When wearing the §#FCC050Mask of the Fanatic ☠§7,
§nAura§7 will radiate from yourself
instead of your §nTotem§7.

Increase §nAura§7's damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+10% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 10%)

85.name: §j§lPool of Rejuvenation
85.description:
§7When wearing the §#97E6FCMask of the Heretic §7,
§nFrog Dance§7 will create a small pool
when hitting the ground. (Max 3)

Gain §f+1§7 Mana every §f0.2s§7 while
inside of at least one pool.

§d⌛ §7Duration: §f8s
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f5 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)

86.name: §i§lCorporeal Manifestation
86.description:
§7When wearing the §fMask of the Awakened ♚§7,
all of your other Masks will spin around
you, dealing damage and applying
§nHaunting Memory§7's effects.

§2➼ §7Range: §f3 Blocks

87.name: §j§lEldritch Transfusion
87.description:
§7Refreshing §nEldritch Call§7 while it is already active
will imbue its attacks with blood, granting it §f+1§7 stack
of §bTransfused §4⚕ §8(Max 3)§7.

For every §f1§7 stack of §bTransfused §4⚕§7 §nEldritch Call§7 has,
its attacks deal more damage. All stacks are lost
when §nEldritch Call§7 ends.

§e✧ §7Effect: §f+7%§7 damage to Eldritch Call §8(Per stack)

88.name: §i§lRepulse
88.description:
§7Once §nAura§7 rebounds, it will radiate back out
and deal its effects a third time.

§nSacrificial Shrine§7 will heal §c50%§7 less health.

89.name: §f§lBloodiest
89.description:
§7Increase your maximum §bBlood Pool §4⚕ §7by §f+30 §7points.
§7Increase your maximum §bBleeding §c §7duration by §f+1.5s§7.

90.name: §h§lHaemomagnetic
90.description:
§7§nBlood Sorrow§7 will chain §f50%§7 further
and deals increased damage.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f+40% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: +30%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: +10%)

91.name: §5§lPatchwork Abomination
91.description:
§6Click Combo:§r §d§lF

§7Summons the §bPatchwork Abomination§7,
a highly unstable summon.

Hit the §bAbomination§7 with §nOverseer§7 to
switch between close-ranged and
long-range attack mode.

The §bAbomination§7 will attack enemies
every §f1.25s§7 in close-ranged mode,
and every §f1.75s§7 in long-ranged mode.

§nExploding Puppets§7 will cause the
§bAbomination§7 to explode when it dies.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f2400% §8(of your DPS, Attack)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 1600%)
   §8(§2✤ §8Earth: 500%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 300%)
§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f5000% §8(of your DPS, Explosion)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 4000%)
   §8(§c✹ §8Fire: 1000%)
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f20s
§3☀ §7Vision: §f32 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped)
§3☀ §7Area of Effect: §f12 Blocks §7(Circle-Shaped, Explosion)

§7Activate abilities to charge
your §bUltimate Meter ⌛§7 to 100%.

92.name: §5§lSundered Skies
92.description:
§6Click Combo:§r §d§lF

§7Your §nTotem§7 massively grows in size,
§fdoubling§7 all of its effects.

When your §nTotem§7 lands, it summons
a massive Thundercloud that zaps enemies
every §f1s§7, stunning them for §f1.5s§7.

Damage is split between all enemies.

§c⚔ §7Total Damage: §f2400% §8(of your DPS)
   §8(§6✣ §8Damage: 1600%)
   §8(§e✦ §8Thunder: 400%)
   §8(§b❉ §8Water: 400%)
§e✧ §7Effect: §f100%§7 Slowness (§c⬤§7) to Enemies
§2➼ §7Radius: §f24 Blocks
§d⌛ §7Duration: §f18s

§7Activate abilities to charge
your §bUltimate Meter ⌛§7 to 100%.

93.name: §5§lMonument to Gloom
93.description:
§6Click Combo:§r §d§lF

§7Your §nTotem§7 becomes possessed by an eldritch
demon, granting §f+5%§7 §bBlood Pool §4⚕§7 to nearby
acolytes every §f0.4s§7

Others recieve §f+5%§7 §bHealth §c❤§7 every §f0.4s§7

§d⌛ §7Duration: §f15s

§7Activate abilities or lose health to charge
your §bUltimate Meter ⌛§7 to 100%.
